title: boerhavia repens subsp. diandra
intro: Boerhavia repens subsp. diandra is a species of plant in the Nyctaginaceae family, commonly known as the 'Snake Vine' or 'Herbe à serpent'. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Boerhavia repens subsp. diandra include its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and various skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by making a decoction from the roots or leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application.
